content: Remote OK SCL Agent Skanska Costain STRABAG Joint Venture Job Reference scsrail/TP/7304/4212<br><br>Contract Type Permanent<br><br>Closing Date 19 July, 2026<br><br>Job Category Tunnels &amp; Routeway<br><br>Business Unit Construction Management<br><br>Location London, Flexible<br><br>Posted on 30 June, 2026 ops, finance, golang London, 2026-07-06T20:07:50+00:00 1134541 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-scl-agent-skanska-costain-strabag-joint-venture-1134541 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Agent Skanska Costain STRABAG Joint Venture Salary Competitive<br><br>Frequency Monthly<br><br>Job Reference scsrail/TP/76/4207<br><br>Contract Type Permanent<br><br>Closing Date 27 July, 2026<br><br>Job Category Structures &amp; Earthworks<br><br>Business Unit Construction Management<br><br>Location London - West Ruislip, United Kingdom<br><br>Posted on 29 June, 2026 ops, finance, golang Ruislip, 2026-07-06T20:07:29+00:00 1134540 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-agent-skanska-costain-strabag-joint-venture-1134540 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Scrum Master Holliday Systems Inc <strong>HSI Agile Revenue Partner Program</strong><p><strong>Company:</strong> Holliday Systems Inc.</p><p><strong>Opportunity Type:</strong> Part-Time Partnership / Support Resource Track</p><p><strong>Spots Available:</strong> 10 Founding Partner Positions</p><p><br></p><p>Holliday Systems Inc. is looking to partner with skilled Scrum Masters, Agile Coaches, Delivery Leads, and Agile professionals who want to use their experience to create additional income, support business transformation, and help organizations execute at a higher level.</p><p>This is not a traditional job. This is a partnership opportunity for execution-minded professionals who want to grow beyond employment, build influence, support client delivery, and create additional income part-time.</p><p><br></p><p>The goal is to train and position 10 Agile Revenue Partners as trusted support resources for HSI client work, coaching programs, implementation projects, business transformation engagements, and future revenue opportunities.</p><p><br></p><strong>About HSI</strong><p>Holliday Systems Inc. helps entrepreneurs, small businesses, nonprofits, private offices, and growing organizations improve execution, systems, revenue operations, and business delivery.</p><p>HSI combines Agile delivery experience, business coaching, implementation support, automation tools, CRM systems, content strategy, and accountability to help clients move faster and execute with discipline.</p><p><br></p><strong>Who This Is For</strong><p>This opportunity is ideal for:</p><p>Scrum Masters</p><p>Agile Coaches</p><p>Agile Delivery Leads</p><p>Project Managers</p><p>Program Managers</p><p>Business Analysts</p><p>Product Owners</p><p>Consultants</p><p>Veterans with Agile, leadership, or operations experience</p><p>Professionals looking to grow into coaching, consulting, or implementation work</p><p>You do not need to have everything figured out. You do need to be coachable, professional, reliable, and willing to learn how HSI serves clients.</p><p><br></p><strong>What You Will Support</strong><p>As an Agile Revenue Partner, you may support HSI with:</p><p>Client onboarding and discovery support</p><p>Agile coaching and facilitation</p><p>Business execution sessions</p><p>CRM and workflow implementation support</p><p>Meeting facilitation and follow-up</p><p>Project tracking and delivery support</p><p>Client accountability check-ins</p><p>Documentation, SOPs, and process improvement</p><p>Training sessions and group coaching support</p><p>Business growth and implementation projects</p><p>Partner outreach and client relationship support</p><p>The purpose of this role is to help HSI serve more clients while giving qualified partners a real pathway to earn, grow, and become part of the broader HSI implementation ecosystem.</p><p><br></p><strong>What You Will Learn</strong><p>Partners will receive training and exposure around:</p><p>HSIâs client delivery model</p><p>Business execution systems</p><p>Agile consulting outside of corporate jargon</p><p>How to support entrepreneurs and small businesses</p><p>How to working with business owners and teams</p><p>Wants to grow beyond a traditional 9â5 role</p><p>Is interested in part-time income opportunities</p><p>Can support client-facing work with
